Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within Macao.
Personal Commercial Enterprise (Empresa Individual de Responsabilidade Limitada): A simple structure for sole proprietors. Owner has unlimited liability for debts.
Corporate Commercial Enterprise (Sociedade Comercial por Quotas): Most common limited liability company. Offers limited liability protection for shareholders.
One-Person Limited Liability Company (Sociedade Unipessoal Limitada): Similar to a Corporate Commercial Enterprise with just one shareholder (and director). Offers limited liability protection.
Public Limited Company (Sociedade Anonima): Complex structure for larger businesses seeking public offerings. Offers limited liability for shareholders.
Partnership (Sociedade Irregular): A business agreement between two or more parties who share ownership, profits, and losses.
